text:
ホントはおたくに頼む程の事じゃ
ねーんだけどよ……

あいつの防御って隙がねーじゃん？
その隙を作るのも手間が掛かるし。

まぁ、オレの戦術を用いれば確実に
仕留められるけどよ、そこに
おたくのいつものあれが加われば

それこそ完璧な戦術の出来上がり
ってもんだろ？

お互いの為にもなるしよ。
ここはひとつ、よ

Now listen, this one might not really
be at your level, but hear me out.

These things don't show any gaps in their
defense, yeah? And it's a real pain trying to
force an opening out of 'em.

I mean, me? Yeah, I can take 'em out
no problem. But still, I think seeing you
in action might help.

Nothing wrong with stepping up my
game from perfect to godlike, right?

This'll be good for the both of us.
So go on and get out there for me!
